prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk".
Find the FIRST later section heading visible on this page after Item 7.
- If the "Item 7A" heading is visible, Item 7 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- The answer may be only a few lines if the next heading appears near the top of the page.
- Do NOT transcribe any text from below that next heading.
- If no later section heading is visible on this page, then Item 7 continues to the bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 7 immediately before it ends. Use only text that belongs to Item 7. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
The information set forth under Note 1 to the consolidated financial statements under the caption “Basis of Presentation and Summary of
Significant Accounting Policies” is incorporated herein by reference.
